LanguageData.FB_AcidBroodmotherConvergence.label: acid broodmother convergence
LanguageData.FB_AcidBroodmotherConvergence.descriptio: Teach the colony brain to fuse spine fleshbeasts into a draftable broodmother that grows temporary acid-spitting offspring.
LanguageData.FB_AcidBroodmotherConvergence.generalRul: subject_story->fused spine fleshbeasts into a mobile acid brood
subject_story->taught a broodmother to grow temporary artillery offspring
